# @onlinesales-ai/ui

Osmos design system — 118 components built on Chakra UI v3 with a custom theme. Install once, get consistent UI everywhere.

## Installation

### 1. Configure the registry

Create `.npmrc` in your project root:

```
@onlinesales-ai:registry=https://npm.pkg.github.com
//npm.pkg.github.com/:_authToken=YOUR_GITHUB_PAT
```

> Generate a PAT at https://github.com/settings/tokens with `read:packages` scope.

For pnpm, also add:
```
public-hoist-pattern[]=*
```

### 2. Install

```bash
npm install @onlinesales-ai/ui
# or
pnpm add @onlinesales-ai/ui
```

### 3. Wrap your app

```jsx
import { OsmosProvider } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";

function App() {
  return (
    <OsmosProvider defaultColorMode="light">
      {/* your app */}
    </OsmosProvider>
  );
}
```

### 4. (Optional) Import global CSS tokens

To use design tokens as CSS custom properties (`--osmos-*`) in your own `.css` / `.less` files:

```js
import "@onlinesales-ai/ui/tokens.css";
```

Do this once at your app entry point. Then anywhere in your CSS:

```css
.my-card {
  background: var(--osmos-bg);
  color: var(--osmos-fg);
  border: 1px solid var(--osmos-border);
  border-radius: var(--osmos-radii-md);
  padding: var(--osmos-spacing-4);
  font-size: var(--osmos-fontSizes-sm);
}

.badge-active {
  color: var(--osmos-colors-green-600);
}
```

Semantic tokens automatically switch between light/dark when `OsmosProvider` sets `data-theme` on the root.

---

## Usage

```jsx
import { Button, Box, Text, Badge, Card } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";

function MyComponent() {
  return (
    <Card.Root variant="outline">
      <Card.Body>
        <Text fontSize="sm" color="fg.muted">Status</Text>
        <Badge colorPalette="green" variant="subtle">Active</Badge>
        <Button colorPalette="blue" size="md">Save</Button>
      </Card.Body>
    </Card.Root>
  );
}
```

> **Important:** Complex components (Card, Table, Tabs, Modal, Drawer, Menu, Steps, RadioCard, etc.) use compound dot-notation — `Card.Root`, `Card.Body`, etc. Sub-components are **not** available as flat named imports.

Full component reference: [`docs/UI-COMPONENT-REFERENCE.md`](../docs/UI-COMPONENT-REFERENCE.md)

---

## Build

```bash
# Full build (compile + generate tokens.css)
pnpm run build

# Compile only (no type-check)
pnpm run build:babel-only

# Re-generate tokens.css from existing dist
pnpm run generate-tokens
```

---

## What's included

- **118 components** — layout, forms, data display, navigation, overlays, feedback
- **`dist/tokens.css`** — 500+ CSS custom properties for all design tokens
- **Full TypeScript types** at `dist/src/index.d.ts`
- **Light + dark mode** via `OsmosProvider` and `data-theme` attribute

---
